positive: A highly stylized and aesthetically pleasing minimalist illustration of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) gracefully leaping among constellations and nebulae. The design should feature strong, deep silhouettes of the fox and its tail against a vibrant, cosmic backdrop of purples, teals, deep blues, and glowing golds. The style should be highly graphic, evoking Art Nouveau elements mixed with modern vector illustration, optimized for screen printing on fabric. Use clean lines, high contrast, and a central, dynamic composition suitable for a t-shirt graphic. Include subtle, glowing geometric mandalas woven into the background energy flow. Flat color application with selective gradient highlights on the nebulae. High detail, symmetry, ethereal, vibrant, vaporwave cosmic aesthetic.
negative: blurry, text, words, logo, watermark, signature, bad anatomy, low resolution, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, deformed, cropped, jpeg artifacts, messy, grainy
